ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each audio sample */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who uploaded the sample */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample was uploaded */,
  "wav_file" TEXT /* File path to the audio sample */,
  "signal_to_noise_ratio" REAL /* Signal-to-noise ratio of the audio sample */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the audio sample */,
  "peak_start_sec" REAL /* Time in seconds when the peak of the cough event starts */,
  "timestamp_ms" TEXT /* Timestamp in milliseconds when the sample was processed */,
  "cough_prediction_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of the audio sample containing a cough */,
  "is_cough" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the audio sample is classified as a cough */,
  "sample_duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio sample in seconds */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio sample in Hz */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_samples_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user associated with the profile */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* List of health conditions the user has */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies the user has */,
  "medications" TEXT /* List of medications the user is taking */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the user */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cough_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user associated with the statistics */,
  "total_coughs" INTEGER /* Total number of cough events detected */,
  "average_signal_to_noise_ratio" REAL /* Average signal-to-noise ratio of cough events */,
  "average_loudness" REAL /* Average loudness of cough events */,
  "average_peak_start_sec" REAL /* Average time in seconds when the peak of the cough event starts */,
  "average_cough_prediction_score" REAL /* Average cough prediction score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cough_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user associated with the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Patient, Doctor, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_information" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who owns the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., Smartphone, Tablet) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_information_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user associated with the record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of the health record (e.g., Doctor's Note, Test Result) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "doctor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the doctor */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of medical tests */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, upload, view) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., Health Alert, System Update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cough_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cough event */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the audio sample containing the cough event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cough event occurred */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the cough event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cough_events_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES audio_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an audio sample */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the audio sample */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made to the sample in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES audio_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_provider_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-provider relationship */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., Primary Care Physician, Specialist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_relationships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_relationships_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system update */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
